name: io.github.stillmarcus24/stillos
title: StillOS — Calibrated Prediction Signals + Notary
description: Calibrated probability signals for Kalshi CPI and GDP prediction markets. Political Brier 0.0011 on 1,299 forward-committed predictions. Tamper-evident notarization. All outputs Ed25519-signed. x402 USDC micropayments on Base.
